theme_archetype.name: Swiss & High-Contrast (Linear-Style)
theme_archetype.rationale: Enterprise SaaS dashboard prioritizing clarity, focus, and rapid task completion. Matches problem statement constraints (no dark mode, Linear/Notion aesthetic).

cards.recommendation: bg-[#EEF4FF] border border-[#2D6BE4]/20 rounded-lg p-6 shadow-sm

buttons.primary: bg-[#2D6BE4] text-white hover:bg-[#2D6BE4]/90 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium text-sm transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-[#E8E6E1] text-[#1A1916] hover:bg-[#FAFAF8] px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium text-sm transition-colors
buttons.danger: bg-[#E84444] text-white hover:bg-[#E84444]/90 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium text-sm transition-colors

badges.high_risk: bg-[#E84444]/10 text-[#E84444] px-2 py-1 rounded-md text-xs font-medium
badges.medium_risk: bg-[#F5A623]/10 text-[#F5A623] px-2 py-1 rounded-md text-xs font-medium
badges.recovered: bg-[#22A95B]/10 text-[#22A95B] px-2 py-1 rounded-md text-xs font-medium
badges.ai_insight: bg-[#2D6BE4]/10 text-[#2D6BE4] px-2 py-1 rounded-md text-xs font-medium flex items-center gap-1

navigation.topbar: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-[#FAFAF8]/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-[#E8E6E1] h-16 flex items-center justify-between px-6

motion_and_interactions.hover: Subtle changes in box-shadow (shadow-sm to shadow-md) and border color for interactive elements.

accessibility.contrast: All text combinations strictly meet or exceed WCAG AA standards using the defined palette.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: The codebase uses .js and .jsx files, NOT .tsx. All your React components MUST be written in JavaScript.
Use standard HTML+Tailwind or Shadcn UI with severe overrides to match the ultra-minimalist Linear look.
Do NOT use dark mode. The app must solely exist in the Light theme.
Do NOT use gradients or purely decorative background blobs. Follow the #FAFAF8 background strictly.
Avoid heavy box-shadows. Use `shadow-sm` consistently to give cards a slight lift against the #FAFAF8 background.
Card borders must strictly be 1px solid #E8E6E1.
For the Inter font, ensure headers use tracking-tight to maintain a sophisticated, precision-tool aesthetic.
Use Lucide React (lucide-react) for a crisp, structural icon set.
All interactive elements MUST include `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid="customer-at-risk-card"`).
Recommendation card must use the #EEF4FF background to stand out without relying on heavy borders.
Do NOT center align text or elements excessively. Keep layouts left-aligned, structured, and predictable.
